summary: Tested teacher and student experience improvements. Backend: 15/15 tests passed - teacher permissions, scoped data access, and student self-report APIs all working correctly. Frontend: Teacher dashboard loads, Admin tab hidden. ISSUE: 'My Lectures (محاضراتي)' tab NOT visible in bottom tabs for teacher - it should show based on _layout.tsx code (line 184).

ui_bugs.issue: My Lectures tab (محاضراتي) not visible for teacher role despite isTeacher check at line 184

action_items: INVESTIGATE: My Lectures (محاضراتي) tab not visible for teacher - check if href conditional at line 184 is being evaluated correctly in web context
The isTeacher variable is set correctly (role === 'teacher') but the tab is not rendering
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: All teacher scope filtering working correctly - teacher sees only their own workload data (1 record)
Backend: Teacher /api/courses returns only their courses (scope filter working)
Backend: Teacher /api/students returns only students enrolled in their courses (scope filter working)
Backend: report_teacher_workload permission added to teacher defaults in permissions.py
Frontend: Bottom tabs _layout.tsx line 184 - href: isTeacher ? undefined : null should show tab when role=teacher

success_rate.frontend: Partial - Teacher login works, admin hidden, but My Lectures tab missing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs all working. Frontend My Lectures tab (محاضراتي) not showing for teacher despite isTeacher check at _layout.tsx line 184. The tab file exists at /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/my-lectures.tsx. The href condition 'isTeacher ? undefined : null' should show the tab when role=teacher.

backend_api_tests.teacher_login: PASS - Teacher (9999/9999) can login successfully, role=teacher
backend_api_tests.teacher_auth_me_permissions: PASS - /api/auth/me returns correct permissions including report_teacher_workload
backend_api_tests.teacher_workload_scoped: PASS - /api/reports/teacher-workload returns only teacher's own data (1 record)
backend_api_tests.teacher_courses_scoped: PASS - /api/courses returns only teacher's courses (scope filtered)
backend_api_tests.teacher_students_scoped: PASS - /api/students returns only students in teacher's courses
backend_api_tests.student_permissions: PASS - Student has correct limited permissions (report_student)
backend_api_tests.admin_full_access_workload: PASS - Admin sees all teachers in workload report
backend_api_tests.compare_teacher_vs_admin_students: PASS - Teacher sees fewer students than admin
backend_api_tests.compare_teacher_vs_admin_courses: PASS - Teacher sees fewer courses than admin

frontend_tests.teacher_login_ui: PASS - Teacher can login via UI
frontend_tests.teacher_dashboard_loads: PASS - Dashboard loads with teacher name حسن صالح
frontend_tests.teacher_admin_tab_hidden: PASS - Admin tab properly hidden for teacher
frontend_tests.teacher_my_lectures_tab: FAIL - My Lectures (محاضراتي) tab NOT visible in bottom tabs

rca_of_the_issue.issue: My Lectures tab (محاضراتي) not showing for teacher
rca_of_the_issue.code_analysis: Tab is defined with href: isTeacher ? undefined : null (line 184), isTeacher = role === 'teacher' (line 78)
rca_of_the_issue.verified: Role returns correctly as 'teacher' from API
rca_of_the_issue.possible_cause: The Expo Router Tabs href conditional may not be re-evaluating when user state changes, or there's a timing issue with the auth store
rca_of_the_issue.suggested_investigation: Check if user state is available when _layout.tsx renders, or if there's a race condition
